name: FunkSec
brief: "The individuals behind FunkSec appear to have extensively leveraged AI to enhance their capabilities, as evidenced by their publications and tools. Their public script offerings include extensive code comments with perfect English (as opposed to very basic English in other mediums), likely generated by an LLM agent. Similar patterns are visible in the Rust source code linked to the group’s ransomware, suggesting it may have been developed with AI assistance. In some of their published messages, the group specifically linked the development of their ransomware to AI-assisted agents, likely providing it with the source code for the ransomware and simply shared the output on their site. The use of such tools aligns closely with the group’s public claims, as they also released an AI chatbot based on Miniapps to support their operations"
ttpMd: **LLM-enhanced scripting techniques** T1588 - Develop Capabilities: Tool
